title: Browse homepage catalog and verify hero, categories, and product grid render
description: Verifies the homepage loads with the hero section, category filters, and a visible grid of product cards with key information.

steps.description: Verify element "Category filter tabs" is visible
Verify element "A product card" is visible

title: Filter products by selecting a category tab and verify results update
description: Verifies selecting a category filter updates the product grid to show products for that category.

steps.description: Verify element "Category filter tabs" is visible
Click on a non-default category tab in the category filter tabs
Verify element "A product card" is visible
Click on the "Todos" (or equivalent All) category tab
Verify element "A product card" is visible

title: Add a product to the cart from a product card and verify toast and cart badge increment
description: Verifies clicking Agregar on an in-stock product adds it to the cart, shows a confirmation toast, and increments the floating cart badge.

steps.description: Verify element "A product card with an 'Agregar' button" is visible
Click "Agregar" button on a product card
Verify element "Floating cart badge" is visible

title: Add the same product twice and verify cart badge reflects quantity increase
description: Verifies adding the same product multiple times increments the floating cart badge accordingly.

steps.description: Verify element "A product card with an 'Agregar' button" is visible
Click "Agregar" button on a product card
Verify element "Floating cart badge" is visible
Click "Agregar" button on the same product card again

title: Filter to a category with no active products and verify empty-state message
description: Verifies selecting a category with no active products shows an empty-state message instead of product cards.

steps.description: Verify element "Category filter tabs" is visible
Click a category tab that is expected to have no active products
Verify text "No hay productos" is visible

title: If Agregar is clickable on an out-of-stock product, show error toast and do not increment cart
description: Verifies that attempting to add an out-of-stock product triggers an error toast and does not increase the cart badge.

steps.description: Scroll to an out-of-stock product card (marked as sin stock / agotado or similar)
Verify text "Sin stock" (or equivalent out-of-stock label) is visible
Click "Agregar" on the out-of-stock product card (if the button is present)
Verify element "Floating cart badge" is visible

title: Product cards display core details consistently after filtering
description: Verifies that after applying a category filter, product cards still show name, price, description, and image for visible items.

steps.description: Click on a non-default category tab in the category filter tabs
Verify element "A product card" is visible

title: Increase item quantity updates item subtotal and cart subtotal, then proceed to checkout
description: Verifies that increasing quantity updates pricing in real time and the user can proceed to checkout.

steps.description: Verify element "Cart item quantity control" is visible
Click the "+" button on the first cart item

title: Decrease quantity to zero removes the item from the cart
description: Verifies that clicking the minus button down past 1 removes the item and updates the cart view.

steps.description: Verify element "Cart item row" is visible
Click the "-" button on the first cart item
Click the "-" button on the first cart item
Verify element "Cart item row" is not visible

title: Remove item using explicit remove control updates the order summary
description: Verifies that the remove action deletes the item and recalculates the order summary.

steps.description: Verify element "Remove item from cart" is visible
Click "Remove item from cart" for the first cart item

title: From cart, continue shopping returns to the menu/catalog
description: Verifies that the user can return from the cart to continue browsing products.

title: Delivery order: complete checkout and open WhatsApp with formatted message
description: Verifies a customer can place a Delivery order, see shipping applied, and be redirected to WhatsApp with a prefilled order message.

steps.description: Fill "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the phone number field
Type "Av. Corrientes 1234" into the address autocomplete field
Select the first visible address suggestion from the suggestions list
Verify element "map with a location marker" is visible

title: Delivery order: adjust map pin updates address and keeps shipping visible
description: Verifies that changing the pin location updates the address shown and maintains a detected shipping section.

steps.description: Type "Av. Santa Fe 2000" into the address autocomplete field
Select the first visible address suggestion from the suggestions list
Click on the map at a different nearby point to move the pin

title: Delivery order: cash payment requires entering cash amount
description: Verifies that selecting cash prompts for cash amount and keeps the WhatsApp submission button available after completion.

steps.description: Fill "Juan Perez" into the name field
Fill "1122334455" into the phone number field
Verify text "¿Con cuánto pagás?" is visible
Fill "20000" into the cash amount field
Verify element "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" is visible

title: Pickup (Retiro): address/map hidden and shipping is $0
description: Verifies that selecting Pickup hides address/map inputs and sets shipping to $0 in the summary.

steps.description: Verify element "address autocomplete field" is not visible
Fill "1198765432" into the phone number field
Verify element "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" is visible

title: Validation: missing phone blocks submission with inline error
description: Verifies that phone is required and submission is prevented with a visible validation message.

title: Delivery coverage: out-of-zone address shows coverage error and blocks order
description: Verifies that an address outside delivery zones triggers an out-of-coverage error and prevents WhatsApp redirect.

steps.description: Fill "1133344455" into the phone number field
Type "Ruta 2 km 60" into the address autocomplete field
Select the first visible address suggestion from the suggestions list
Verify text "fuera de cobertura" is visible

title: Business not accepting orders: submission blocked with clear message
description: Verifies that when the business is paused or outside operating hours, the checkout prevents submitting an order and shows a clear message.

steps.description: Fill "1144455566" into the phone number field
Verify text "no estamos tomando pedidos" is visible

title: Payment method switch: changing payment hides cash amount when not needed
description: Verifies that cash amount input appears for cash and disappears when switching to a non-cash payment method.

steps.description: Verify text "¿Con cuánto pagás?" is visible
Verify text "¿Con cuánto pagás?" is not visible
Verify element "Enviar pedido por WhatsApp" is visible

title: Admin dashboard loads and shows KPI cards
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can access the dashboard and see the KPI cards for sales, orders, and average ticket.

title: Admin dashboard shows sales chart section
description: Verifies the dashboard includes a visible sales chart area for the recent period.

steps.description: Scroll to the sales chart section

title: Admin dashboard shows recent orders list
description: Verifies the dashboard contains a visible recent orders section with an orders list/table.

steps.description: Scroll to the recent orders section
Verify element "Recent orders list" is visible

title: Navigate from dashboard to Products via sidebar
description: Verifies the sidebar navigation works from the dashboard to the Products admin page.

steps.description: Click the "Products" link in the sidebar

title: Dashboard data sections render without empty-state blocking UI
description: Verifies that the KPI, chart, and recent orders sections render as visible UI blocks even if values are zero or lists are short.

steps.description: Verify element "KPI cards section" is visible
Verify element "Recent orders list" is visible

title: Dashboard remains usable after refresh-style re-entry via dashboard link
description: Verifies the admin can re-open the Dashboard via sidebar and still sees the dashboard sections.

steps.description: Click the "Orders" link in the sidebar
Click the "Dashboard" link in the sidebar

title: Create a new product and verify it appears in the admin products table
description: Verifies an admin can create a product and see a success message and the new row in the products table.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the admin navigation menu

title: Create product form requires mandatory fields and blocks submission
description: Verifies submitting the create product form without required inputs shows validation messages and does not create a product.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the admin navigation menu

title: Edit an existing product and verify updated values are shown in the table
description: Verifies an admin can open an existing product, update fields, save, and see the updated data in the products table.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Editar" action for the first product in the table
Type "Producto Editado" into the name field

title: Inline edit a product price from the table
description: Verifies an admin can edit a product price inline and see the updated price reflected in the table.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the admin navigation menu
Click the price cell for the first product in the table
Type "9999" into the inline price input field
Click the inline "Guardar" or confirmation control

title: Toggle out-of-stock status and verify the table reflects the new stock state
description: Verifies an admin can toggle out-of-stock status and see the stock indicator update in the products table.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the admin navigation menu
Click the out-of-stock toggle for the first product in the table

title: Delete a product from the products table after confirming the dialog
description: Verifies an admin can delete a product via the confirmation dialog and the product row is removed from the table.

steps.description: Click on "Productos" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Eliminar" action for the first product in the table

title: Create a new category and verify it appears in the categories list
description: Verifies an admin can create a category and see it immediately in the list.

steps.description: Click "Categories" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "New category" or "Create category" button

title: Save a new category with a unique name and confirm it shows in the list
description: Verifies saving a valid new category adds it to the categories table/list view.

steps.description: Click "Categories" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "New category" or "Create category" button
Type "E2E Category Alpha" into the Name field

title: Attempt to create a category with an empty name and verify validation feedback
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving a category without a required name and shows visible feedback.

steps.description: Click "Categories" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "New category" or "Create category" button
Verify text "Name is required" is visible

title: View orders list table and key columns
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open Orders and see the orders table with status badges and key columns.

steps.description: Verify an orders table is visible

title: Open order details drawer from an order row
description: Verifies an admin can open an order’s details by clicking a row and see core sections in the details drawer.

steps.description: Click the first order row in the orders table

title: Order details show customer, items, shipping cost, and payment method
description: Verifies the order details drawer displays customer info, ordered items, shipping cost, and payment method.

steps.description: Click the first order row in the orders table

title: Update an order status to Pagado from the details drawer
description: Verifies an admin can change an order status to Pagado and sees a success toast and updated status badge.

steps.description: Click the first order row in the orders table
Click the "Mark as Pagado" action in the order details drawer

title: Filter orders by status
description: Verifies filtering by a specific status reduces results to matching orders.

steps.description: Select "Pendiente" from the status filter dropdown
Verify the orders table is visible

title: Filter orders by date range
description: Verifies applying a date range filter shows results consistent with the selected range.

steps.description: Click the date range filter control
Verify the orders table is visible

title: Search orders by customer name or phone
description: Verifies searching in Orders narrows the list to matching customer name/phone entries.

steps.description: Verify the orders table is visible

title: Search with no matches shows empty state
description: Verifies searching for a non-existent customer shows an empty results state without crashing.

steps.description: Verify an orders table is visible

title: View delivery zones page with map and existing zones list
description: Verifies an admin can reach Delivery Zones Management and see the interactive map and any existing zones displayed.

steps.description: Click "Delivery Zones" in the admin navigation menu
Verify element "Delivery zones map" is visible

title: Create a new delivery zone polygon successfully
description: Verifies an admin can draw a new polygon, fill the zone form, save, and see the new zone added to the map and list.

steps.description: Click "Delivery Zones" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Draw polygon" tool on the map
Click on the map to place the first polygon point
Click the "Save" button for the zone

title: Complete zone creation by filling required fields then saving
description: Verifies the zone form accepts name, shipping cost, free-shipping threshold, and color, and saving results in a visible new zone entry.

steps.description: Click "Delivery Zones" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Draw polygon" tool on the map
Click on the map multiple times to create a polygon with at least three points, then finish the polygon
Type "Test Zone A" into the zone name field
Type "500" into the shipping cost field
Type "5000" into the free shipping threshold field
Select a color from the zone color picker
Click the "Save" button for the zone
Verify text "Test Zone A" is visible

title: Prevent saving when polygon has fewer than 3 points
description: Verifies validation prevents saving an invalid delivery zone polygon with insufficient points and displays an error message.

steps.description: Click "Delivery Zones" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Draw polygon" tool on the map
Click on the map to place only two polygon points
Click the "Save" button for the zone

title: Prevent saving when required form fields are missing
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving a drawn polygon if required zone fields (like name or shipping cost) are empty and shows validation messages.

steps.description: Click "Delivery Zones" in the admin navigation menu
Click the "Draw polygon" tool on the map
Click on the map multiple times to create a polygon with at least three points, then finish the polygon
Click the "Save" button for the zone

title: Update operating hours and days and save successfully
description: Verifies an admin can change operating hours and operating days and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Type "10:00" into the opening time field
Type "23:00" into the closing time field

title: Pause orders with custom message and confirm checkout is blocked
description: Verifies pausing orders in admin settings shows a pause message on checkout and prevents ordering.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Click the "Pause Orders" toggle to turn it ON
Type "We are temporarily closed for maintenance." into the pause message field
Verify text "We are temporarily closed for maintenance." is visible
Verify text "Orders are paused" is visible

title: Resume orders and confirm checkout is available again
description: Verifies turning Pause Orders OFF removes the pause blocking message from checkout.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Click the "Pause Orders" toggle to turn it OFF
Verify element "Place order via WhatsApp" is visible

title: Validation error when saving with no operating days selected
description: Verifies the settings form requires at least one operating day before saving.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Click to deselect all currently selected operating days
Verify text "Select at least one operating day" is visible

title: Update WhatsApp business number and save successfully
description: Verifies an admin can configure the WhatsApp number used for order submission and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Type "+5491112345678" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Prevent saving with invalid WhatsApp number format
description: Verifies the WhatsApp number field shows a visible validation error for an invalid value.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Type "abc-not-a-number" into the WhatsApp number field
Verify text "Enter a valid WhatsApp number" is visible

title: Custom pause message is required when pausing orders
description: Verifies enabling Pause Orders without a message prompts a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Click the "Pause Orders" toggle to turn it ON
Type "" into the pause message field
Verify text "Pause message is required" is visible

title: Settings persist after refresh of the settings page
description: Verifies saved settings are reloaded and displayed after re-opening the Admin Settings page.

steps.description: Click on "Settings" in the admin navigation
Type "09:30" into the opening time field
Type "22:30" into the closing time field

title: WhatsApp order submission opens wa.me with a pre-filled message (happy path)
description: Verifies that submitting a checkout order opens WhatsApp via a wa.me link with an encoded, pre-filled order message.

title: WhatsApp link includes the configured business number
description: Verifies that the generated wa.me URL includes the restaurant's configured WhatsApp number as the destination.

title: Submitting order with missing WhatsApp number shows an error toast and does not open wa.me
description: Verifies that when the business WhatsApp number is not configured, the UI shows an error and prevents navigation to wa.me.

title: Order message is URL-encoded in the wa.me text parameter
description: Verifies that the WhatsApp message is encoded and passed via the text query parameter in the wa.me URL.

title: Submitting from checkout with empty required fields does not open WhatsApp
description: Verifies that the checkout validation prevents WhatsApp navigation when required customer fields are missing.
